description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with white brick exterior walls and a flat roof. The front facade features a central blue-gray door flanked by a single window, both framed in a modern style. A small, neatly trimmed hedge and white picket fence enclose a green front yard, adding a touch of suburban charm. The side and rear walls are unadorned, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a minimalist design. The roof appears flat and unfinished, with no overhang or visible roofing material. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for a small urban residential lot.
description: A small, white brick bungalow with a flat roof, blue-gray door, single front window, and a fenced green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue-gray door, single window, white picket fence, and green yard with hedges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain white brick wall and the side of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view with a featureless white brick wall and a glimpse of the interior through the open roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain wall and the continuation of the fenced yard.
